coreMeaning.en: generalized graphs where edges connect multiple vertices

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hyper(超)+graph(图)=超图，边可连多个顶点的广义图
hyper(超)+link(连接)=超链接，点击即跳转的网页链接

coreMeaning.en: abnormally high levels of lipids in blood

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hyper(过高)+lipid(脂)+aemia(血症)=血脂过高症
hyperlipidaemia 的复数形式
hyper(过度)+sensitive(敏感)=过敏；对微小刺激有强烈反应

coreMeaning.en: excessively increased sexual desire or activity

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hyper(过度)+sexuality(性欲)=性欲过度亢进

coreMeaning.en: text with embedded links to other documents

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hyper(超)+text(文本)=超文本，包含链接的网页文本
hyper(超)+therm(热)=超高温；人工产热治疗装置

coreMeaning.cn: 大肆宣传；皮下注射（第三人称单数）

derivationChain: {'steps': [{'form': 'hype', 'meaning': '大肆宣传'}, {'form': 'hypes', 'meaning': '大肆宣传（第三人称单数）'}]}

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hype → 过度炒作、夸大宣传

coreMeaning.en: deficiency of blood; bleeding in the anterior chamber of the eye

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hyp(hypo不足)+hem(血)+ia(症)=血液不足；贫血

coreMeaning.en: punctuation mark used to join words or syllables

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hyphen源自希腊语'合在一起'，是连接两词的符号'-'
hypn(睡眠)+osis(状态)=催眠状态，似睡非睡

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hypn(睡眠)+otic(…的)=催眠的，令人昏昏欲睡

coreMeaning.cn: 被催眠的；使着迷（过去分词）
coreMeaning.en: put into a hypnotic state; fascinated

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hypnotise(催眠)+d=已被催眠，处于恍惚状态

derivationChain: {'steps': [{'form': 'hypo+chondr', 'meaning': '季肋下（古代认为此处藏有情绪）'}, {'form': 'hypochondria', 'meaning': '疑病症'}, {'form': 'hypochodriasis', 'meaning': '疑病症（医学术语）'}]}

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hypo(下)+chondr(软骨/季肋)+iasis=季肋下焦虑→疑病症

coreMeaning.cn: 患疑病症的人；疑病症的
coreMeaning.en: person excessively anxious about their health

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hypo(下)+chondr(季肋)+iac=季肋下焦虑的人，总以为自己生病

coreMeaning.en: pretending to have virtues or beliefs one does not actually have

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hypo(台下)+crit(扮演)+sy=台下扮演→表里不一→虚伪

coreMeaning.en: a person who pretends to have virtues they don't actually possess

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hypo(台下)+crite(扮演者)=台后扮演，说一套做一套的人

coreMeaning.en: behaving in a way that contradicts one's stated beliefs

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hypocrite+ical=具有伪善者特质的，表里不一

coreMeaning.en: relating to the region below the skin; hypodermic needle

hypo(不足)+pigmentation(色素)=色素不足；皮肤变白
hypopigmentation 的复数

coreMeaning.en: proposed explanation made as a starting point for investigation

hypothesis(假设)+ize=提出假设（美式动词）

coreMeaning.en: based on or involving a hypothesis; supposed

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: hypothesis(假设)+ical=假设性的，还没有被证实的

hystera是hyster的完整古希腊语形式，意为子宫
